title: Project Constraints
description: Project-wide invariants that must not be violated across any state transition. Constraints are organized by category and each has a unique ID for traceability. The top-level 'version' field is a repository-specific schema metadata extension consumed by the validation scripts.

schema_version.description: Version of the constraints schema this file was written against.

version.description: SemVer version of this constraints file.

last_updated.description: Date of last update in YYYY-MM-DD format.

categories.description: Constraint categories (e.g., Security, Licensing, Architecture, Quality, Performance).

id.description: Unique constraint ID (e.g., 'C-001'). Sequential across the entire file.

text.description: The constraint text. Should be a clear, enforceable rule.

rationale.description: Optional explanation of why this constraint exists.

added.description: Date when this constraint was added.
